title: Possible initialization issue in Xilinx DSP48E1 cell

features.name: conditional register initialization with wrong attribute check
features.description: Code should include an initial block with a conditional that checks an attribute to initialize a register, where the bug is that a wrong attribute (CREG) is used instead of the correct attribute (DREG) for the Dr register initialization

features.name: DSP pipeline register conditional initialization
features.description: Code should include DSP48E1 pipeline register initialization where Dr register is conditionally initialized based on DREG parameter
